audit_items.proof_trace: android.c contains zero `free()` calls and zero heap allocations (`malloc`/`calloc`/`strdup` absent); all variables in both `protect_socket` and `send_traffic_stat` are stack-allocated. The property quantifier `forall free(p)` ranges over an empty set, so the UAF/double-free invariant holds vacuously. Socket file descriptors (`sock`) are closed exactly once on every code path.
